content:
# Pore Coupling

**Summary**: The effect where small and large pores are connected, complicating the interpretation of petrophysical properties.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-al-garadi|AL-GARADI, 2019]] noted that pore coupling effects can complicate T2 interpretation in carbonate rocks.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-al-garadi|AL-GARADI, 2019]] Pore coupling in carbonates can mask the distinction between different pore sizes or fluid types.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-al-garadi|AL-GARADI, 2019]] T2 distribution analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- One peak appeared in some carbonates due to the pore coupling effect. ([[2019-al-garadi|AL-GARADI, 2019, p. 53]])
